mapper.select: SELECT CD_GROUP_ID, DTL_CD, DTL_CD_NM, DTL_CD_DESC, INDC_ODRG, USE_YN, EXPNSN_STR_VAL1, EXPNSN_STR_VAL2, EXPNSN_STR_VAL3, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT FROM NMCP_CD_DTL WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' AND CD_GROUP_ID IN ('TRTW', 'HANDP','STEX') ORDER BY CD_GROUP_ID, INDC_ODRG

SELECT STOR_SEQ, STOR_CD, STOR_NM, STOR_DIV, TEL_NO, STICKER_EXP, TRT_WRKJOB, HANDL_PROD, ZIPCD, STOR_ROADN_ADR, STOR_ARNO_ADR, DTL_ADR, LATIT_VAL, LNGIT_VAL, MARK_IMG, STOR_ITR, SHOW_YN, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT, NFC_ABLE_VAL, NFC_DISABLE_VAL, STOR_SORT FROM NMCP_STOR_ADM_BAS WHERE STOR_SEQ = #{storSeq}

SELECT COUNT(STOR_SEQ) FROM NMCP_STOR_ADM_BAS WHERE SHOW_YN = 'Y'
AND STOR_DIV = #{storDiv}
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청북도')||'%')
AND LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{schDivStr})||'%'
AND LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{subAddr})||'%'
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{searchStr})||'%')
AND STOR_CD IN (SELECT NPSIT.STOR_CD FROM NMCP_PROD_STOR_INVENTORY_TXN NPSIT WHERE 1 = 1 AND NPSIT.PROD_ID = #{prodId} AND NPSIT.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )

SELECT NSAB.STOR_SEQ, NSAB.STOR_CD, NSAB.STOR_NM, NSAB.STOR_DIV, NSAB.TEL_NO, NSAB.STICKER_EXP, NSAB.TRT_WRKJOB, NSAB.HANDL_PROD, NSAB.ZIPCD, NSAB.STOR_ROADN_ADR, NSAB.STOR_ARNO_ADR, NSAB.DTL_ADR, NSAB.LATIT_VAL, NSAB.LNGIT_VAL, NSAB.MARK_IMG, NSAB.STOR_ITR, NSAB.SHOW_YN, NSAB.CRET_ID, NSAB.AMD_ID, NSAB.CRET_DT, NSAB.AMD_DT, NVL(NSAB.NFC_DISABLE_VAL,0) AS NFC_DISABLE_VAL, NVL(NSAB.NFC_ABLE_VAL,0) AS NFC_ABLE_VAL, (ACOS(SIN(#{latitVal}*3.141592653589793/180.0)*SIN(NSAB.LATIT_VAL*3.141592653589793/180.0) + COS(#{latitVal}*3.141592653589793/180.0)*COS(NSAB.LATIT_VAL*3.141592653589793/180.0)*COS((#{lngitVal}-NSAB.LNGIT_VAL)*3.141592653589793/180) )*180/3.141592653589793)*60*1.1515*1609.344 DIST
,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM NMCP_PROD_STOR_INVENTORY_TXN NPSIT WHERE NPSIT.STOR_CD = NSAB.STOR_CD AND NPSIT.PROD_ID = #{prodId} AND NPSIT.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') ) AS INV_CNT
FROM NMCP_STOR_ADM_BAS NSAB WHERE NSAB.SHOW_YN = 'Y'
AND STOR_DIV = #{storDiv}
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청북도')||'%')
AND LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{schDivStr})||'%'
AND LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{subAddr})||'%'
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_NM) LIKE '%'||LOWER(TRIM(#{searchStr}))||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{searchStr})||'%')
AND EXISTS (SELECT NPSIT.PROD_ID FROM NMCP_PROD_STOR_INVENTORY_TXN NPSIT WHERE NPSIT.STOR_CD = NSAB.STOR_CD AND NPSIT.PROD_ID = #{prodId} AND NPSIT.USE_YN = 'Y' AND SYSDATE BETWEEN TO_DATE(PSTNG_START_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AND TO_DATE(PSTNG_END_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') )
ORDER BY NSAB.STOR_SORT DESC ,NSAB.STOR_NM ASC
ORDER BY DIST ASC ,STOR_NM ASC

SELECT STOR_SEQ, STOR_CD, STOR_NM, STOR_DIV, TEL_NO, STICKER_EXP, TRT_WRKJOB, HANDL_PROD, ZIPCD, STOR_ROADN_ADR, STOR_ARNO_ADR, DTL_ADR, LATIT_VAL, LNGIT_VAL, MARK_IMG, STOR_ITR, SHOW_YN, CRET_ID, AMD_ID, CRET_DT, AMD_DT, NFC_ABLE_VAL, NFC_DISABLE_VAL FROM NMCP_STOR_ADM_BAS
STOR_SEQ = #{storSeq}

SELECT SUBSTR(SUBSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,INSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,' ')+1,30),0, INSTR(SUBSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,INSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,' ')+1,30),' ') ) AS SUB_ADDR FROM NMCP_STOR_ADM_BAS WHERE SHOW_YN='Y'
AND STOR_DIV = #{storDiv}
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('경상북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('전라북도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충남')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청남도')||'%')
AND (LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충북')||'%' OR LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER('충청북도')||'%')
AND LOWER(STOR_ROADN_ADR) LIKE '%'||LOWER(#{schDivStr})||'%'
AND SUBSTR(SUBSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,INSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,' ')+1,30),0, INSTR(SUBSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,INSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,' ')+1,30),' ') ) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY SUBSTR(SUBSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,INSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,' ')+1,30),0, INSTR(SUBSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,INSTR(STOR_ROADN_ADR,' ')+1,30),' ') )
